description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND a monthly user is logged in
AND the user is on the Home page

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to an SVOD tile
steps.result: The following statement is spoken, "<content_title>, <content_description>, <content_length>, press select to play, X of Y items in the carousel, press <appropriate_directions> to view other videos in the carousel, press up or down to browse more content"
